title: M0 and Anchorage Digital Team to Support Stablecoin Builders
message_html: M0 and Anchorage Digital Team to Support Stablecoin Builders ...
snippet: Cryptocurrency firm Anchorage Digital has launched a partnership with stablecoin infrastructure company M0. The collaboration is designed to merge M0’s infrastructure capabilities with Anchorage’s regulated issuance experience to serve a “growing universe of stablecoin builders,” the companies said
